task_frame_summary: The product brief looks crisp and implementation-ready, but the apparent cleanliness may be hiding under-specified forbidden zones and stakeholder expectations.
assumed_goal: Assess whether the brief can safely enter decomposition without inventing extra certainty.
explicit_constraints: Stay inside the existing Studio proposal layer.
Do not infer missing approval or rollout semantics.
Keep the result local and evaluative.
latent_frame_risks: The brief looks complete enough to suppress missing constraints.
A neat summary may hide scope expansion into adjacent authority layers.
missing_but_decisive_questions: Which constraints are explicit versus merely conventional?
What would count as out of scope even if the brief sounds broad?
frame_risk_signals: low visible friction despite multiple implied boundaries
high polish with low evidence density
notes: This is a classic premature-cleanliness case rather than an overtly invalid ask.
